title: The Sons’ Cups
description: The future Straw Hat Grand Fleet leaders offer their loyalty to Luffy.
scene: On pages 2–6, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Straw Hat Pirates, Zoro gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here comes a killer blow!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Clash! Luffy vs. Admiral Fuitora!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And another!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: How 'bout an extra helping of my foot and my fist...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This one's ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: comin' straight for your head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Before I blow you away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gunah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: gyaaah! He chooses now of all times to start going all out!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Perhaps we should go and provide back up!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "I can appreciate what Luffy's trying to prove,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But what's the deal with him altering his fighting style all of a sudden!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: gyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna run away any more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well, looks like you're willing to walk the walk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'd like to say "that's the spirit;" but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "What in blazes...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Are you playing at? "Here comes a killer blow," "a help- ing of my foot and my fist... " Why are you announcing all of your attacks?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Could it be that... you actually feel sorry for me?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I'm a Marine HQ Admiral! People call me Monster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I will not tolerate being patronized! I guess it really must get under people's skin, a blind man standing on the battlefield...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If your goal was to get a rise out of me... you've more than succeeded! That head of yours isn't going to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Screw you! Since you can't see, I wanted you to know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Exactly how I was kicking your ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It isn't like I hate you or any- thing, old man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: P- PPAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: What's so funny, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I'll punch that smirk off your face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: of what use could that pity possibly be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Looks like I was wrong about you! to think that there was such an illogical ideal behind your actions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Gravity Blade!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: surely there ought to be such a thing as "principle" in a battle between men!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: How can you so easily toss around words such as sympathy, love and hate!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Fierce Tiger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: How can you be this stupid, boy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I've been trying my Damndest to stick to my principles from the very start here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: There he is! HAJ- Rudin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Alright, Luffy! Tag me in!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: No, no! Please, now's not the time, zero- Senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: We've got enough on our plate already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Enough on our plate?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Oi! Why's there only one ship in the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Look again! Besides, who'd want to anchor their ship here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: What with all the crazy shit that's been going on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Wha... oh! Now I see it! There's a bunch of ships all anchored in a straight line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Damn, that is a crazy amount of ships!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: That's right! Most of our ships are actually anchored 5 km out, in the mist!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This is my yonta Maria Grand Fleet's "connection bridge"! Cross out to sea with it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: GUWAH! Put me down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: That's it! Put him's straight on the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Oi! I'm still giving him a piece of my mind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Please, let it go! Don't make me grovel!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: It's simply far too late, Straw Hat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: I can't see it, but I'm sure you can.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: That inescapable pitch-black sky... that near-infinite amount of rubble... your ships will all sink.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Oi! Lemme go! I'm not done with him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Can you really not see it? Even if by some stroke of luck you manage to escape me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Keep it in your pants! We've got stuff to do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: The yonkou are already on the move. By taking out jokes, you've painted a bullseye on your back! From here on out, saying your life will be a living-hell would be an understatement...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Give us back Rebecca, Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Are you telling me you never were a hero, Lucy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how much this country has hurt that poor girl!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Just leave her alone, for heaven's sake!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Wait just a minute there, citizens of Dressrossa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: I'm fairly certain there's no one but criminals beyond this point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Please stop! Allow me to take...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: You pitted me for these eyes of mine, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: truth be told, they are the fruits of my own labor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: I closed them my- self...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: I've seen too many things no man should bear wit-ness to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Well then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: The least I can do is send you to hell myself...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Move it, marine! You can take your help and shove it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: We're gonna take care of these pirates with our own hands!

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
